RevSure AI is an AI-powered platform founded in 2021 and based in Palo Alto, California. It is designed to assist B2B go-to-market (GTM) teams in optimizing performance, accelerating pipeline creation, and achieving revenue predictability. The platform offers full-funnel attribution, analytics, and agentic AI solutions to unify GTM data and automate actions throughout the customer journey.

With over 25 integrations, RevSure enhances visibility into lead journeys, making it a valuable resource for high-growth B2B companies.

Short Description:
Firework is a leading AI-powered platform for video commerce, founded in 2017 by Vincent Yang and Jerry Luk. Based in Silicon Valley, the company has a global team of over 300 members across six offices, including locations in New York, Toronto, London, Hong Kong, and Tokyo. Firework has raised over $250 million in funding and collaborates with more than 1,500 brands, retailers, and publishers worldwide.

The platform offers an immersive video commerce solution that includes tools for content sourcing, curation, and syndication. Firework enhances digital experiences by embedding videos on websites, integrating them into emails, and linking physical products to digital content through QR codes. It also deploys videos in physical retail spaces to engage shoppers and educates them about products. By unifying brand stories and creating meaningful interactions, Firework helps brands connect authentically with consumers and drive engagement across multiple channels.

Short Description:
Amplitude Studios is a French video game developer founded around 2010 by former Ubisoft employees. The studio specializes in turn-based historical and sci-fi strategy games, particularly in the 4X genre, which focuses on exploration, expansion, exploitation, and extermination. Their flagship title, *HUMANKIND*, is a grand strategy game that allows players to build civilizations across different eras, blending 60 historical cultures from the Neolithic to the Contemporary era.

*HUMANKIND* features a variety of gameplay mechanics, including culture mixing, a Fame system for victory, and tactical depth with procedurally generated maps and multi-terrain battles. The game supports both single-player and multiplayer modes, offering customizable settings for different play styles. Amplitude Studios also has a portfolio that includes other titles in the *Endless* universe and earlier 4X games like *Endless Space*. The studio is committed to delivering high-quality gaming experiences, with a focus on community feedback and accessibility for new players.

You probably buy your own clothes, right? Some like to explore stores to find new clothes, while others don't. You may ask the sales assistant for advice to change or renew your style. After looking at you and thinking "hmm, ok, yes", he/she might say; "I may have something that suits your preferences. Any particular preferences?". You likely end up getting a wonderful experience and probably bought more than planned, still, you will come back due to the extraordinary experience. Shopping online is different matter. You visit a web store and are presented with models looking just great. Imagine if you had your own personal sales assistant online. The assistant would know your preferences, listen to your needs, considering your environmental preferences and ensuring you utilize your existing wardrobe better by enriching it. Your personal clothing assistant that helps you look and feel your best.

Our experience is that this is quite common and is the motivation for Aiutrix and what we do. Aiutrix is a company that believes in creating greater customers experiences. The way we create greater customers experiences is by making extraordinary personal services that feel natural to use, are engaging and adds value to the customers.

We create the customer experience of tomorrow!

Sales reps in most companies are probably already using their personal WhatsApp, to initiate or follow up with prospects. However, personal WhatsApp numbers are disconnected from the CRM process and hence lack sophisticated CRM integrations, assignment rules, conversation automation, and reporting capabilities required to manage high-velocity sales. On the other hand, automated conversation with cold/warm leads free up the sales team's time, allowing them to focus on more serious prospects, improving productivity.

Our current clients see an immediate CAC reduction of over 10% with this platform.

Short Description:
Bonsai (Shop Bonsai Inc.) is a Toronto-based embedded commerce technology company founded in 2016. It specializes in platforms that facilitate product discovery, persistent carts, and secure in-article checkouts within digital content for publishers and retailers. Bonsai has evolved from a streetwear style app into a leader in content-driven commerce, partnering with 30 of the world's largest publishers and integrating over 1,200 brands.

The company's core offering, Native Commerce, embeds full commerce experiences into websites and content. This includes features like product display, persistent carts, and native checkout, allowing users to purchase products directly within the content they consume. Bonsai aims to enhance the customer journey from inspiration to purchase, benefiting publishers, brands, and shoppers alike. In April 2024, Bonsai expanded its global reach by acquiring MyBestBrands, forming the Inspiration Commerce Group to enhance product discovery and instant purchasing capabilities.

Short Description:
ChangeJar is a Canadian-based mobile commerce platform that helps retailers grow sales, increase customer loyalty, and reduce sales commission overheads. 

ChangeJar is based on converting physical cash into digital cash, not credit cards, and this enables us to pass on the savings to retailers in the form of flat rate mobile service fees that are up to 20 times lower than credit and debit based apps and web services. 

Customers pay for mobile services via the ChangeJar consumer mobile app or by chatting to the ChangeJar virtual shop assistant on Facebook Messenger.  

MOBILE COMMERCE SERVICES

The ChangeJar mobile commerce platform supports the following services:

> Order Ahead: for "skip the line" mobile take-out services (similar to Starbucks mobile app)

> Scan & Go: for mobile self-check-out services (similar to the Amazon Go retail stores)

> Park & Go: for "skip the kiosk" mobile parking services

> Team Perks: lets food and beverage retailers run employee perk programs for local employers

> Town Perks: lets BIAs and Chambers of Commerce run shopper incentive promotions for main street retailers

> Smart Rewards: discounts that drive loyalty, multi-item purchases, and repeat visits 

In Q1 2018, a single merchant used the ChangeJar platform to sell over 30,000 coffees in as part a gourmet coffee program run in partnership with a local employer.

CONVERSATIONAL COMMERCE

As well as supporting a consumer mobile app for iPhone and Android, ChangeJar also makes it possible for buyers to make purchases via chat-based platforms like Facebook Messenger.

PARTNERSHIPS

ChangeJar also partners with large-scale e-commerce websites and consumer apps who are seeking to address credit card processing fees. 

By introducing a ChangeJar "Pay With Cash" option, these businesses can offer their customers a non-credit (and no debt, no interest) option.

ZEALS aims to bring the essence of *omotenashi*, or Japanese anticipatory customer service, into digital interactions. Their fully managed social chat commerce platform offers automated, interactive experiences tailored to specific marketing goals. Key features include AI-powered conversations, zero-party data collection for enhanced user insights, and robust analytics for trend analysis. With over 480 enterprise clients globally, ZEALS has experienced significant growth, raising substantial funding to support product development and expansion efforts.

Connectly.ai is a conversational commerce company founded in 2021 and headquartered in Redwood City, California. The company utilizes proprietary AI models to automate customer communications and sales across various messaging platforms, including WhatsApp, Instagram, SMS, and web-based chatbots. Connectly.ai aims to empower e-commerce brands and retailers, particularly small to medium-sized businesses and enterprises, by facilitating the entire sales journey through personalized, two-way conversations.

The company's AI-powered 360° platform serves as a unified solution for sales agents and customer support, automating customer interactions to enhance efficiency and satisfaction. Key features include integration with omnichannel messaging for personalized notifications, an AI product recommendation assistant named Sofia, and automation of basic conversations and ad campaigns. Connectly.ai supports retailers in numerous countries, helping them convert customer messages into revenue across various industries.

Since its Series A funding, Connectly.ai has experienced significant growth, nearly doubling its revenue and raising $20 million in a Series B round led by Alibaba. This funding supports the company's global expansion in the conversational commerce market, which is projected to reach $130 billion by 2025.

MindMeld, Inc. is a San Francisco-based artificial intelligence company founded in 2011, originally as Expect Labs, Inc. The company specializes in developing a conversational AI platform that enables the creation of intelligent voice and chat assistants with natural language understanding capabilities. MindMeld's technology supports natural human-computer interactions, including question-answering, content browsing, and smart home device control.

In May 2017, MindMeld was acquired by Cisco for $125 million, becoming part of Cisco's Cloud Collaboration group. The platform enhances products like Cisco's Webex Assistant and is available as an open-source framework for developers to create custom bots and applications. MindMeld's offerings include a scalable AI platform that supports various use cases, such as food ordering, video discovery, and home assistance, targeting businesses from startups to enterprises. The company collaborates with major industry players, providing solutions that integrate with third-party applications for improved user experiences.

Super.com is a fintech company based in San Francisco, founded in 2016 by Hussein Fazal and Henry Shi. Originally known as SnapCommerce and SnapTravel, it has transformed into an all-in-one savings super app that serves over 30 million users in 150 countries. The company aims to democratize access to rewards, savings, and credit-building, particularly for subprime and low-income demographics.

The Super.com app offers a variety of financial products, including the SuperCash Card for cashback rewards, cash advances, and digital banking services. Users can access discounts on travel bookings, shopping, and everyday purchases, along with exclusive perks through the Super+ membership. The company has processed over $2 billion in sales and delivered more than $200 million in direct savings. With a workforce of around 200 employees, Super.com has raised over $255 million in funding and has been recognized as one of the fastest-growing companies in North America.
